description: GeoClaw reduced-mode South Fork low-flow single-reach profile closure for the corrected-boundary Milestone 18 real-world row.

source.notes: Derived from normalized GeoClaw h/u/v fields for the South Fork American low-runnable beginner single-reach row; used only as bounded real-world fixture calibration with feature forcing disabled, reduced profile fast path enabled, and initial-mass preservation disabled for the open-boundary comparison.
